chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-196 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 10.07.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner Muhammad Siddique Soomro. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w ASI Mashooq Ali, S.H.O. P.S. C-Section, Thull. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is owner of the 150 jarebs land situated in Khosa Taluka Thull, and the private respondents are putting pressure upon the petitioner to sell the said land to them; upon denial, they are issuing threats to the petitioner of dire consequences; hence the petitioner apprehends danger to his life, therefore, he has maintained instant petition for providing protection to him. Pursuant to notice, Respondents No.5 and 7 are present in person and have denied the allegation of causing harassment to the petitioner. Learned Assistant Advocate General as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh submit that the official respondents are ready to provide protection to the petitioner as and when required and seek disposal of the petition. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the petition in the above terms. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the Petitioner in accordance with law. Judge Manzoor
